Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: buses [300212677], passenger vehicles [300227816], freewheeled vehicles by form or function [300227810], freewheeled vehicles [300227809], land vehicles by form [300215717], land vehicles [300212968], vehicles (transportation) [300219258], Transportation Vehicles (hierarchy name) [300042929], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: electric vehicles [300227911], motor vehicles [300042934], freewheeled vehicles by method of propulsion [300227819], freewheeled vehicles [300227809], land vehicles by form [300215717], land vehicles [300212968], vehicles (transportation) [300219258], Transportation Vehicles (hierarchy name) [300042929], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Buses or buslike vehicles whose power comes from attachments linking them to overhead electrical wires.
Úsese para designar un autobús o vehículo en forma de autobús cuya energía proviene de conexiones que lo ligan a un cable eléctrico situado sobre él.
Te gebruiken voor bussen of busachtige voertuigen die hun aandrijfkracht verkrijgen via hulpstukken die een verbinding leggen met elektrische leidingen die boven de bus lopen.
Bus oder ein ähnliches Fahrzeug, dessen Antriebskraft von einem Anbauteil kommt, das ihn mit einer elektrischen Oberleitung verbindet.

Source.Source_ID: 2000034021/Pushkarev et al., Urban Rail in America (1982)
